source: Analyzed from provided concept sheets (Stage 1-10) + full turnaround + base body

layers.name: Inner Base Layer (Chemise + Internal Corset)
layers.construction_notes: Lightweight cotton/linen blend with antique lace trim and cross embroidery. Creates smooth foundation for outer layers.

layers.name: Outer Corset + Waist Belt System
layers.construction_notes: Structured cotton coutil with steel boning. Multiple antique brass belts, central rose buckle, D-rings and hanging chains. Provides strong waist shaping.

layers.name: Underskirt + Multi-Tier Petticoat (6 layers)
layers.construction_notes: Layered cream and dark lace petticoats for volume, movement and silhouette support. Scalloped lace edges throughout.

layers.name: Outer Skirt + Asymmetrical Overskirt + Front Apron Panel
layers.construction_notes: Navy-black jacquard with subtle floral/scroll woven pattern. Heavy gold metallic embroidery, deep red rose appliqués. Asymmetrical side drapes + prominent front apron panel with ornate gold work.

layers.name: Puff Sleeves + Leather Bracers + Lace Cuffs
layers.construction_notes: Gathered puff sleeves with antique gold printed motif. Detachable black leather bracers with rose medallions, studs and lace ruffle trim at wrist.

layers.name: Rear Bow / Bustle + Back Skirt Drape + Lacing
layers.construction_notes: Large structured navy bow with central rose brooch and hanging antique brass chains. Back skirt drape panel + visible corset lacing detail.

layers.name: Jewelry Set + Hair Ornaments + Belt Charms + Kitchen Knife
layers.construction_notes: Layered necklaces with garnet glass pendants and rose motifs. Multiple rose hair ornaments with chains. Belt with dangling keys, crosses and roses. Ornate kitchen knife with rose-engraved blade and blood details.

layers.name: Striped Stockings + Lace-up Victorian Boots
layers.construction_notes: Black and charcoal horizontal striped stockings with delicate lace cuff. Heavy black leather Victorian lace-up boots with antique brass hardware, stacked block heel and detailed sole tread.
